title: Coupon status badge
description: Composite badge showing the coupon's overall state — combines is_active + valid window + usage cap into a single at-a-glance signal. Colour + text label. Never colour-alone. Priority order: 'Expired' (past valid_until) > 'Not yet valid' (before valid_from) > 'Inactive' (is_active=false and not yet expired) > 'Cap reached' (usage_count >= usage_cap) > 'Active'.

showUsage.description: When true + user has coupons.view-financials, appends 'X / Y used' after the status label.

variant.$expr: (props.validUntil && new Date(props.validUntil) < now()) ? 'danger' : (new Date(props.validFrom) > now() ? 'warning' : (!props.isActive ? 'neutral' : (props.usageCap != null && props.usageCount >= props.usageCap ? 'warning' : 'success')))

leadingIcon.$expr: (props.validUntil && new Date(props.validUntil) < now()) ? 'clock' : (new Date(props.validFrom) > now() ? 'clock' : (!props.isActive ? 'pause-circle' : (props.usageCap != null && props.usageCount >= props.usageCap ? 'exclamation-triangle' : 'check-circle')))

children.$expr: (props.validUntil && new Date(props.validUntil) < now()) ? 'Expired' : (new Date(props.validFrom) > now() ? 'Not yet valid' : (!props.isActive ? 'Inactive' : (props.usageCap != null && props.usageCount >= props.usageCap ? 'Cap reached' : 'Active')))
